title: SRMIST Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: SRMIST Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: SRMJEEE Result 2026 Phase 1 has been released by SRM Institute of Science and Technology for B.Tech admissions. Students can check and download their scorecard and rank online from the official portal at srmist.edu.in.

content.text: SRM Institute of Science and Technology has officially released the SRMJEEE Result 2026 Phase 1 for B.Tech programmes in online mode for the 2026-27 admission session. The SRMJEEE Phase 1 result has been published in the form of a scorecard and rank details that will be used for B.Tech counselling and seat allotment at SRMIST campuses. SRM Institute of Science and Technology Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - srmist.edu.in.

Students can check and download their SRMJEEE 2026 result by logging in with their application number and password or date of birth on the official result portal. After downloading the scorecard, candidates are advised to carefully verify their personal details, score, rank and other information, and contact SRMIST immediately in case of any discrepancy.

SRM Institute of Science and Technology has released the SRMJEEE Result 2026 Phase 1 for B.Tech admissions for the 2026 academic session on its official website. Candidates who appeared in the Phase 1 exam can now log in using their SRMJEEE 2026 credentials to download their scorecard and check their rank for B.Tech counselling. The online result portal at srmist.edu.in provides instant access to the SRMJEEE 2026 Phase 1 result, which students can save and print for future reference during the admission process.

SRM Institute of Science and Technology has activated the SRMJEEE Result 2026 Phase 1 direct link on the official website for candidates seeking admission to B.Tech programmes. Students can use the official SRMJEEE 2026 result link given below to instantly view or download their Phase 1 scorecard and rank by logging in with their application details. The direct link to check SRMJEEE Result 2026 Phase 1 is hosted at srmist.edu.in, ensuring secure and quick access to the SRM B.Tech entrance result.

sections.heading: How to Download SRMJEEE Result 2026 Phase 1

content.text: Follow the steps given below to check and download the SRMJEEE Result 2026 Phase 1 online from the official website in a simple and error-free manner.

items: Visit the official website of SRM Institute of Science and Technology at srmist.edu.in.
On the homepage, click on the SRMJEEE 2026 Result or SRM B.Tech Entrance Result Phase 1 link.
You will be redirected to the SRMJEEE 2026 candidate login page.
Enter your SRMJEEE 2026 application number and password or date of birth in the specified fields.
Click on the Login or Submit button to proceed.
Your SRMJEEE Result 2026 Phase 1 scorecard, along with rank details, will be displayed on the screen.
Check all details carefully and then click on the download option to save the result as a PDF.
Take a printout of the SRMJEEE 2026 scorecard to use during counselling, document verification and admission.
